product_overview: Lakoku is a mobile-first interactive novel platform where readers become the protagonist of a 50-chapter drama story. It guides users through onboarding, story selection, reading, branching choices, endings, and private library/profile management in Indonesian.
core_goals: Help readers start a story with a suitable role and story premise
Let readers read chapters and make meaningful branching choices
Allow readers to resume ongoing stories from their progress
Provide a personal library of ongoing and completed stories
Show completed endings and story stats on the profile page
Support AI-assisted story bible creation for authorized users
Provide private narrative operations visibility for consistency monitoring

features.name: Landing and Onboarding
features.description: Introduces the interactive fiction concept and guides new users into the story-start flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Read the product introduction -> Continue to the onboarding flow -> Navigate to /mulai -> Answer the onboarding quiz questions -> Select a recommended story -> Continue into the home experience

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows returning users to sign in with email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See the authenticated home experience
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form with incorrect credentials -> See an invalid credentials message
Navigate to /auth/login -> Choose the sign-up link -> Navigate to /auth/sign-up

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: Allows new users to create an account with email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/sign-up -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Confirm the password -> Submit account creation form -> See the sign-up success confirmation
Navigate to /auth/sign-up -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Confirm the password with mismatched values -> See validation feedback

features.name: Onboarding Role Quiz
features.description: Guides new users through a short quiz to choose a role and pick one of three prepared stories.
user_flows: Navigate to /mulai -> Answer each quiz question by selecting an option -> Move through the steps -> Review the recommended story choice -> Pick a story to begin -> Continue into the home experience
Navigate to /mulai -> Answer a question -> Go back to the previous question -> Change the answer -> Continue the quiz -> Pick a story to begin
Navigate to /mulai -> Answer the quiz -> Restart the quiz -> Start over with new answers -> Pick a different recommended story

features.name: Home Feed
features.description: Shows the current in-progress story and other available stories for authenticated users.
user_flows: Navigate to /beranda -> View the in-progress story card -> Open a story detail page -> Continue reading the current chapter
Navigate to /beranda -> Browse available story cards -> Open a story detail page -> Continue to the story chapter

features.name: My Collection
features.description: Provides a library of ongoing stories and completed endings.
user_flows: Navigate to /koleksiku -> Browse ongoing stories -> Open a story detail page -> Continue reading
Navigate to /koleksiku -> Browse completed endings -> Open a finished story -> View the ending history

features.name: Story Detail
features.description: Shows a specific story’s cover, synopsis, and entry point to continue reading.
user_flows: Navigate to a story detail page -> Review the cover and synopsis -> Continue to the current chapter -> Open the reader view
Navigate to a story detail page -> Review the cover and synopsis -> Return to the home experience

features.name: Chapter Reader with Branching Choices
features.description: Displays a chapter and lets the reader choose between branching options, then advances the story.
user_flows: Navigate to a chapter reader page -> Read the chapter text -> Select one of the available choices -> See the outcome of the choice -> Continue to the next chapter
Navigate to a chapter reader page -> Read the chapter text -> Select a choice -> See that the next chapter is still being prepared -> Wait and try again when ready
Navigate to a chapter reader page -> Select a choice -> Retry the same pending choice after a failed submission -> See the story continue once the choice is accepted
Navigate to a chapter reader page -> Reach a chapter that is not yet available -> See a waiting placeholder while the next chapter is prepared

features.name: Story Ending
features.description: Shows the final ending once a story reaches completed status.
user_flows: Navigate to an ending screen -> View the achieved ending -> Return to the story detail page -> Go back to the story library
Navigate to an ending screen -> View the achieved ending -> Share the ending -> Return to the library

features.name: Brainstorm Story Bible Wizard
features.description: Lets authorized users generate story premises, progress through story-building stages, and lock a story bible to canon.
user_flows: Navigate to /brainstorm -> Request AI-generated premises -> Select one premise -> Advance through cast, mystery, and world stages -> Review the story bible -> Lock the bible to canon
Navigate to /brainstorm -> Regenerate the premise suggestions -> Select a different premise -> Go back a stage -> Update the story bible -> Lock the bible to canon

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Shows reading stats, display name, settings entries, theme controls, and logout.
user_flows: Navigate to /profil -> View display name and reading stats -> Toggle the theme -> Open settings entries
Navigate to /profil -> View display name and reading stats -> Log out -> Return to the public experience

features.name: Consistency Ops Dashboard
features.description: Shows narrative consistency metrics, charts, stale thread status, and alerts for authorized ops users.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/consistency -> View metric cards -> Review the critical-rate chart -> Inspect the stale threads list -> Read the alert banner when present

routes.description: Onboarding/landing page introducing the interactive fiction concept
Onboarding quiz flow to pick a role and choose one of three stories
Home feed showing the in-progress story and other available stories
User's library of ongoing stories and completed endings
User profile with reading stats and settings
AI brainstorm wizard to design a 50-chapter story bible and lock it to canon
Story detail page with cover, synopsis, and resume/continue entry
Reader view rendering a chapter and presenting branching choices
Ending screen shown when a story is completed (status SELESAI)
Ops dashboard for narrative consistency metrics and alerts
Confirmation screen after sign-up (email verification prompt)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Log in with email and password credentials via Supabase auth
user_interactions: Click submit button to log in
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: Register a new account with email and password via Supabase

features.name: Onboarding Role Quiz
features.description: Answer a short multi-step quiz then choose one of three prepared stories to begin
user_interactions: Read and answer each quiz question by selecting an option
Advance automatically or via next between steps
Go back to the previous question
Pick a recommended story to start

features.name: Home Feed (Beranda)
features.description: Shows the currently running story to resume plus other available stories
user_interactions: View the in-progress story hero card
Tap a story card to open its detail

features.name: My Collection (Koleksiku)
features.description: Library separating ongoing stories from completed endings
user_interactions: Tap a story card to open detail

features.name: Story Detail
features.description: Cover, synopsis, and resume entry point for a specific story

features.name: Chapter Reader with Branching Choices
features.description: Renders a chapter and lets the reader make a choice that advances the branching narrative
user_interactions: Select one of the presented choices
See the outcome of the choice
Retry a pending choice if submission failed
See a placeholder when the next chapter is still being written/prepared

features.name: Story Ending
features.description: Ending screen shown only when a story has reached SELESAI status

features.name: Brainstorm Story Bible Wizard
features.description: Multi-stage AI-assisted wizard to design premise, cast, mystery, world, then lock a 50-chapter story bible to canon
user_interactions: Advance through cast, mystery, and world stages
Review and lock the bible to canon

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Profile page with reading stats (ongoing, completed, choices made) and settings entries
user_interactions: View display name and reading stats

features.name: Consistency Ops Dashboard
features.description: Admin dashboard displaying narrative continuity metrics, repair rates, stale threads, and alerts
user_interactions: See alert banner when critical rate breaches threshold

known_limitations.issue: Reader API is served by interim Next.js route handlers under /api/* rather than a dedicated backend
known_limitations.impact: API contracts may change when the real backend replaces the interim handlers

known_limitations.issue: Auth-required routes depend on a valid Supabase session and configured environment variables
known_limitations.impact: Authenticated pages and story data may not load in test environments without valid Supabase credentials

known_limitations.issue: AI generation (brainstorm premises, chapter generation) depends on external LLM provider configuration
known_limitations.impact: AI-dependent flows may fall back or fail without provider credentials
